steps.t: Heshra has asked you to procure large quantities of ingredients he needs from Ziriha, the merchant. She can be found near the fishing pier.
Give dried ingredients to Heshra in the Elder Hall.
Administer salve to afflicted Khûtra villagers. They can be found on the rocks just outside of Khûtra, to the east.
Return to Heshra the herbalist in the Elder Hall.
